# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: DSA Practice Gets Cyberspace Makeover
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's cyberpunk-coded towers and AI-assisted DSA practice, highlighting the Code Breach vibe and new AI enhancements without overhyping.
- Slug: codegrind-dsb-cyber-progression
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsb-cyber-progression
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-01-codegrind-dsb-cyber-progression.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style problems with an AI-assisted teaching layer and a cyberpunk tower-defense aesthetic. Real-time editor, Azure OpenAI guidance, and upcoming gameplay polish make practicing data structures feel interactive and visual.
- CTA: Try a guided practice session today and see how AI hints integrate with problem solving in CodeGrind.
- Visual brief: Static image showing CodeGrind interface with code editor on one side and a cyberpunk tower-defense visualization (towers labeled with ForLoop, IfCondition, Variable, Function) attacking code snippets, neon glow, and subtle GitHub/Azure OpenAI branding; include a small banner stating AI-assisted problem solving.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
